title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 266.440 - Sale, transportation and purchase of garbage-fed swine prohibited
text:
266.440.  Sale, transportation and purchase of garbage-fed swine prohibited. — 1.  No person shall sell or transport any swine which have been fed garbage in violation of sections 266.410 to 266.460.
  2.  No person shall knowingly purchase any swine which have been fed garbage in violation of sections 266.410 to 266.460.
(L. 1953 p. 6 §§ 3, 4)
